name: The Bottom of the Rainbow Dragon
description:
You are standing before a shimmering Rainbow Dragon arching high up into the
sky.  You feel somehow separated from the natural world, even though the
City spire is only a few meters below you.

exits.description: The Rainbow Dragon extends above you, fading out of existence only meters away.

extra_descriptions.description:
The Rainbow Dragon softly glows with beams of light, in colours that defy 
description.
